verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mihonte khempeuh kiangah hih bangin gen in: Note na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa note' Pasian keimah ka siangtho hi
Note a kuamah peuh in na nu leh na pa uh zahtakin, note in ka Sabbath-te na tang ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
“Milimte lamah kihei kei un la, note in a kisungtawm pasian-te nomau-a' dingin bawl kei un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
“Note in Topa' tungah thunuama biakpiakna na piak uh ciangin, note hong kisan' theihna dingin na pia ding uh hi
Tua pen na piak ni mah uh ahih kei leh a zing ciangin kine ding a, a ni thum ni ciangdongin a omlai peuhmah mei tawh kihal ding hi
A ni thum ni-in a kinek peuhmah leh, tua pen a kihhuai hi a, kisanglo ding hi
Tua a ne mi peuhmah in ama mawhna pua ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa' na a siangtho ninsak ahih manin ama mite sung panin kihawlkhia ding hi
“Na leitang tung panun an na lak uh ciangin, na lo uhah a nawl dongin an na la kei ding uh a, an na lak khit uh ciangin a sang zong na khawm kei ding uh hi

Note in na leenggui lo uh hawkmai loin, leenggah a kiate zong na leenggui lo panun na tawm kei ding uh hi. Note in mizawngte leh peemtate-a' dingin tuate na nusia ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
“Note na guta kei ding uh hi. A manloin na gamta kei ding uh a, khatlekhat tungah zuau na kigen kei ding uh hi
Note in a manlopi-in keima min tawh na kiciam kei ding uh a, tua bangin na Pasian uh' min na daisak kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
“Note in na vengte uh na nengniam kei ding uh a, a na na sut kei ding uh hi. A kicial nasempa' thaman pen a zingsang dong zan tawntung na kemcip kei ding uh hi
Note in bilngongte phuisam loin, mittawte' mai-ah a puk theihna ding na na koih kei ding uh a, note in na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
“Note in thukhenna-ah thu a tangloin na khen kei ding uh hi. Mizawngte langgen loin, a liante' thu zuiloin, thumanna tawh na vengte uh thu na khen ding uh hi
Note in na mipihte lak uhah mi gensia-in vaksuk vakto loin, na vengpa uh a sihna dingin na langpang kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi

“Note in na lungsim sung uhah na sanggampa uh na mudah kei ding uh a, na vengte uh tawh thu na kituahlohna uh kikum khawmin na siangsak ding uh hi; tua hi kei leh ama hangin khialhna na pua ding uh hi
Note in nomau' mipihte tungah phu la loin, amau na lungsim neih kei ding uh a, nomau na ki-it uh bangin na vengte uh na it ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi

“Note in ka thukhamte na zui ding uh hi. Note in na ganhingte uh a namdang tawh ta na neisak kei ding uh hi. Note in na lo uhah khaici nam nih na pawikhawm kei ding uh a, khau nam nih a kigan puan zong na silh kei ding uh hi

“Sila ahi numei, midang khat in zuthawl a piaksa, kitankhia nailoin amah suahtakna a kipia nailo nu, pasal dang khat in a lupkhoppih leh, thukanna kinei ding hi. Amaute kithatlo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tuanu sila hi lai hi
Ahih hangin tuapa in amahmah-a' dingin mawhna hanga biakna dingin tuutal khat, kikhopna bukkong, Topa' kiangah hong paipih ding hi
Siampipa in, tuapa a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin mawhna hanga biakna tuutal tawh Topa' mai-ah ama-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, a gamtatnasa a khialhna kimaisak ding hi
“Note, Kanaan gamah tungin nek dingin kung nam khempeuh na suan uh ciangin, note in amau' gahte kum thum sung na ne kei ding uh hi
A kum lina ciangin amau' gah khempeuh siangtho-in, Topa' tungah phatna biakna hi ding hi
Ahih hangin a kum ngana ciangin tuate pen note-a' dingin hong gah semsemna dingin tuate' gah na ne thei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
“Note in sa khat peuhpeuh a sunga si tawh na nekhawm kei ding uh hi. Mailam thugen kholhna, ahih kei leh aisaan na sem kei ding uh hi
Note in na baa samte uh metloin na khamul mongte uh zong na tan kei ding uh hi
Note in mi site' hangin dahna limin na ci tung uh liamsak loin note' tungah ciamtehna khat peuhpeuh zong na sun kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
“Na tanu uh biakinn sungah paktat dinga piakna tawh siasak kei un. Tua bang hi leh pasian dangte biakna sungah na tung ding uh a, gamsung khempeuh, mawhna tawh a kidim suak khading hi
Note in ka Sabbath ni tangin keimah hong kibiakna mun na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
“Vankahte leh aisaanna lamah kihei kei un. Amaute tawh a kininsak dingin amaute zong kei un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
“Note, sam kangte' mai-ah na kun ding uh a, puteekte' maitang zahtakin, na Pasian uh na kihta ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
“Na gamsung uhah note lakah khualmi khat hong peem leh, ama tungah a manloin na gamta kei ding uh hi

Note lakah a hong peem khualmite tualsung mi mah bangin na ngaihsun ding uh a, nomau mah bangin amaute na it ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note pen Egypt gam sungah khualmi na hi ngei uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
“Note in thukhenna, a sau tehna, a tam tehnate-ah a manloin na gamta kei ding uh hi
Note in tawi khaina man, tawisuang man, seu man, bung man, na zang ding uh hi. Kei pen Egypt gam panin a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
Note in ka thukhamte khempeuh leh ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi.
